name: 2nd-5th Metatarsals
description: Lateral heads of 1st - 4th dorsal interossei attach to medial surfaces of 2nd - 5th metatarsals
Medial heads of 2nd – 4th dorsal interossei attach to lateral surfaces of  2nd – 4th metatarsals
Heads of 1st – 3rd plantar interossei attach to medial surfaces of 3rd – 5th metatarsals
5th metatarsal receives attachment from fibularis tertius, fibularis brevis, and flexor digiti minimi brevis
